heading: Control; regulations
label: 142 Control; regulations
text: Wind Cave National Park shall be under the exclusive control of the Secretary of the Interior, whose duty it shall be to prescribe such rules and regulations and establish such service as he may deem necessary for the care and management of the same.
notes: CodificationThis section is a part of section 2 of act . The other part of section 2 of said act is classified to . See note under section 141.Jan. 9, 1903section 141 of this title
